## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring
- [ ] style: CSS / UI changes
- [ ] chore: Maintenance
- [ ] docs: Documentation

## Testing
<!-- How was this tested? -->

- [ ] Builds without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Type-checks pass (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npx eslint src/`)
- [ ] Tested in Obsidian vault
